channel.title: Posts on Alex Kowalczuk
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Alex Kowalczuk

item.title: On Simplicity
item.description:
There’s something satisfying about stripping things down to their essentials. In software, in writing, in design — the best work often comes from removing rather than adding.

I’ve been thinking about this a lot lately as I rebuild my personal site. The temptation is always to reach for a framework, add a build step, pull in dependencies. But what if you just… didn’t?

item.title: Things I Learned This Week
item.description:
A grab bag of things that caught my attention this week.

First, I discovered that Hugo’s summary handling is smarter than I expected. You can either let it auto-truncate or drop a `

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
Every blog starts somewhere. This is that post — the one where I convince myself that yes, I will actually write things here, and no, it won’t just sit empty collecting dust.

The plan is to write about software engineering, side projects, and whatever else I find interesting. No schedule, no pressure. Just writing when I have something worth sharing.
